agent_rules.description: Core principles and rules for AI agents working on repositories

think_first.description: Always plan and understand before implementing

search_before_creating.description: Check if similar code, patterns, or solutions already exist

use_real_references.rule: Use real reference tools (Find References, Find Usages), not plain text search.
use_real_references.description: Use LSP tools (goto_references, goto_definition) for code analysis

follow_existing_patterns.description: Consistency with existing codebase is more important than personal preferences

small_steps.rule: Small steps; each one must run.
small_steps.description: Make incremental changes that can be tested independently

maintenance_cost.description: Write code that is easy to maintain, not just easy to write

big_picture_first.rule: Look at the big picture before touching details.
big_picture_first.description: Understand the overall architecture before making changes

boring_solutions.description: Simple, well-understood approaches over clever or novel ones

one_change_at_time.description: Make atomic changes that can be reviewed and tested independently

data_over_intuition.description: Base decisions on evidence, not assumptions

reduce_scope_when_stuck.description: Simplify the problem rather than adding complexity

clear_communication.rule: Keep communication short, clear, and early.

ask_questions.rule: Ask questions when context is missing.

no_assumptions.rule: Don't make assumptions about user intent.

document_reasoning.description: Explain non-obvious decisions for future reference

no_multitasking.rule: Don't multitask; finish the current thread.
no_multitasking.description: Complete one task before starting another

slow_down_when_uncertain.rule: If tired, confused, or uncertain, slow down.
slow_down_when_uncertain.description: Take time to understand rather than rushing

consistency_over_cleverness.description: Predictable code is better than clever code

verify_target.rule: Always confirm you're modifying the correct repo, branch, and file.

do_only_what_asked.rule: Do only what was asked - nothing extra.
do_only_what_asked.description: Avoid scope creep and unnecessary changes

quick_reference: Use real reference tools, not plain text search.
Small steps; each one must run.
Look at the big picture before touching details.
Keep communication short, clear, and early.
Ask questions when context is missing.
Don't make assumptions about user intent.
Don't multitask; finish the current thread.
If tired, confused, or uncertain, slow down.
Always confirm you're modifying the correct repo, branch, and file.
Do only what was asked - nothing extra.
